exploration_notes:
The MVCC compaction implementation in etcd-io/etcd spans two main packages:

**Compaction scheduling** (`server/etcdserver/api/v3compactor/`): `compactor.go` defines the `Compactor` interface and factory function `New()` that selects between periodic and revision modes. `periodic.go` implements time-based compaction (`Periodic` struct) with a sliding window of recorded revisions. `revision.go` implements revision-based compaction (`Revision` struct) that compacts revisions older than a configure
